system: Darwin 23.6.0 (Apple M1 (Virtual), macOS 14, macos-14 GitHub Actions runner)
data_reliability_notes: 4T and 8T data points are unreliable due to thread oversubscription on a virtualized macOS runner with unknown physical core count. Only 1T and 2T comparisons are trustworthy.

trustworthy_comparison.1T: asmllm 288.43 t/s vs llama.cpp 1933.47 t/s — asmllm 6.7x slower
trustworthy_comparison.2T: asmllm 305.12 t/s vs llama.cpp 1821.55 t/s — asmllm 6.0x slower
